positive: A stylized, symmetrical depiction of a celestial forest at twilight. The scene features elegant, glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna, including stylized glowing mushrooms, interconnected roots forming a complex network, and silhouettes of majestic, gentle flying creatures (like moths or fireflies) traversing through the canopy. The composition should be centered and highly symmetrical, giving the effect of an intricate medallion or mandala. Utilize deep indigos, rich purples, vibrant aquamarines, and contrasting warm gold/lime greens for the glow. The style must be a mix of modern botanical illustration and Art Nouveau stained-glass etching, emphasizing clean lines, strong silhouettes, and high contrast, perfect for a repeat pattern or central graphic print. Clean, vector-like quality, minimal gradient noise, 4K resolution, suitable for screen printing.
negative: text, signature, watermark, logo, trademark, celebrity, cartoon, low resolution, blurry, out of focus, bad anatomy, noisy, gradient, grain, messy, ugly, distortion, artifact, extra limbs
